0.text: Diffuse mild ectasia in both bronchial structures

1.text: Peribronchial thickening in both bronchial structures

2.text: Multiple calcified nodular lesions, subcentimeter in size, in the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Centriacinar nodular ground-glass densities resembling a tree-in-bud pattern near the bronchovascular structures in the upper lobe of the right lung
